title: $10,000 Blood Money
writer: Franco Fogagnolo, Ernesto Gastaldi, Luciano Martino
actors: Gianni Garko, Loredana Nusciak, Claudio Camaso
plot: Hired by a Mexican landowner to rescue his daughter from a bandit, a bounty hunter instead joins the crook on a heist to obtain a higher pay-out, leading to a tragic double-cross.
